```{=html}
<div class="research-feed">


<div class="research-update">
  <div class="research-update-year">2026</div>

  <div class="research-update-content">
    <div class="research-update-label">
      PUBLICATION
    </div>

    <div class="research-update-title">
      <a href="https://doi.org/10.1142/S0218348X26400025" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">CONTROLLABILITY OF THE TIME-VARYING FRACTIONAL DYNAMICAL SYSTEMS HAVING MULTIPLE DELYAS IN CONTROL WITH CAPUTO FRACTIONAL DERIVATIVE</a>
    </div>

    <div class="research-update-journal">
      Fractals
    </div>

    <div class="research-update-citations">
      1 citations
    </div>
  </div>
</div>


<div class="research-update">
  <div class="research-update-year">2026</div>

  <div class="research-update-content">
    <div class="research-update-label">
      PUBLICATION
    </div>

    <div class="research-update-title">
      <a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s42967-025-00548-5" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Controllability of Time-Varying Stochastic Fractional Dynamical Systems with Distributed Delays in Control</a>
    </div>

    <div class="research-update-journal">
      Communications on Applied Mathematics and Computation
    </div>

    <div class="research-update-citations">
      0 citations
    </div>
  </div>
</div>


<div class="research-update">
  <div class="research-update-year">2026</div>

  <div class="research-update-content">
    <div class="research-update-label">
      PUBLICATION
    </div>

    <div class="research-update-title">
      <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.matcom.2025.08.006" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Constrained physics informed deep implicit neural network for ordinary and partial differential equations</a>
    </div>

    <div class="research-update-journal">
      Mathematics and Computers in Simulation
    </div>

    <div class="research-update-citations">
      0 citations
    </div>
  </div>
</div>


</div>
```
